summary: Frontend-only verification of new 'Контакты/Contacts' header nav link on ArtJoga landing. Tested desktop 1440x900 RU + EN and mobile 390x844. All acceptance criteria pass: nav-contacts renders with correct locale label, clicking smoothly scrolls to footer #contacts (verified via getBoundingClientRect within viewport after ~3s Lenis animation), all 5 footer contact items render correct values, EN switch updates label to 'Contacts' and still scrolls, mobile-menu-toggle opens menu and mobile-nav-contacts scrolls to footer.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Header nav-contacts / mobile-nav-contacts feature is verified working on desktop (RU/EN) and mobile. Lenis smooth scroll cooperates with native scrollIntoView; footer #contacts becomes visible within ~3s after click. Footer contact values verified: telegram=artjoga_com, whatsapp=+48 884 021 063, instagram=artjoga_com, email=info.artjoga@gmail.com, phone=+48 884 021 063.
